papers_mined.title: Jarawas Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Andaman Islands ~250 Jarawa population; rich oral transmission of knowledge/history/spiritual beliefs across generations; no written tradition.

papers_mined.title: Onges Little Andaman Ancient Roots
papers_mined.note: All 96 Onge survived 2004 tsunami via oral tradition warning 'huge shaking + high wall of water'; ancestor warnings preserved across many generations.

papers_mined.title: Jarawa Tribe Enigmatic Echoes
papers_mined.note: Communication oral; storytelling + songs + dances transmit knowledge/history/spiritual; multi-generational ancestor-anchored chain.

papers_mined.title: Jarawa Tribal Reserve UNESCO Dossier
papers_mined.note: Linguistic transmission vertical (generational) + horizontal (peer); knowledge of environment/habitat/survival encoded in language.
